query:
-- Vehicle details on jobs
ALTER TABLE jobs
  ADD COLUMN vehicleMake VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN vehicleModel VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN vehicleReg VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN vehicleFuelType ENUM('petrol','diesel','electric','hybrid','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  ADD COLUMN vehicleColour VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN scannedDistanceMiles DECIMAL(8,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN scannedDurationMins DECIMAL(8,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN travelToJobCost DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN travelToJobMode ENUM('train','bus','taxi','own_car','none') DEFAULT 'none',
  ADD COLUMN travelHomePostcode VARCHAR(10) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN travelHomeCost DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN travelHomeMode ENUM('train','bus','taxi','own_car','none') DEFAULT 'none';

-- Receipts table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS receipts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  jobId INT NULL,
  imageUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  merchantName VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  receiptDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalAmount DECIMAL(8,2) NULL,
  category ENUM('fuel','train','bus','taxi','parking','toll','food','other') DEFAULT 'other',
  fuelLitres DECIMAL(8,3) NULL,
  fuelPricePerLitre DECIMAL(6,4) NULL,
  fuelType ENUM('petrol','diesel','electric','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  notes TEXT NULL,
  rawExtracted JSON NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Vehicle details on jobs
ALTER TABLE jobs
  ADD COLUMN vehicleMake VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN vehicleModel VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN vehicleReg VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN vehicleFuelType ENUM('petrol','diesel','electric','hybrid','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  ADD COLUMN vehicleColour VARCHAR(30) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN scannedDistanceMiles DECIMAL(8,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN scannedDurationMins DECIMAL(8,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN travelToJobCost DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN travelToJobMode ENUM('train','bus','taxi','own_car','none') DEFAULT 'none',
  ADD COLUMN travelHomePostcode VARCHAR(10) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN travelHomeCost DECIMAL(8,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN travelHomeMode ENUM('train','bus','taxi','own_car','none') DEFAULT 'none';

-- Receipts table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS receipts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  jobId INT NULL,
  imageUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  merchantName VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  receiptDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalAmount DECIMAL(8,2) NULL,
  category ENUM('fuel','train','bus','taxi','parking','toll','food','other') DEFAULT 'other',
  fuelLitres DECIMAL(8,3) NULL,
  fuelPricePerLitre DECIMAL(6,4) NULL,
  fuelType ENUM('petrol','diesel','electric','unknown') DEFAULT 'unknown',
  notes TEXT NULL,
  rawExtracted JSON NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
